name: California Check Cashing Stores
description_short: Citrus Heights residents can visit California Check Cashing Stores at 6178 Auburn Blvd for fast, reliable check cashing services.
description_long:
California Check Cashing Stores at 6178 Auburn Blvd is a standalone check-cashing location in Citrus Heights, CA. The branch operates Monday through Friday from 9 AM to 7 PM, and Saturday from 10 AM to 4 PM (closed Sundays), making it convenient for weekday errands or Saturday morning visits in Citrus Heights.

At this Citrus Heights location, you can cash checks quickly and reliably. The staff can answer questions about services and current check-cashing fees. Call +1 916-726-2275 during business hours if you need help or want to confirm details before your visit.

When you visit this Auburn Blvd location in Citrus Heights, bring a valid government-issued ID and your check. California Check Cashing Stores handles transactions quickly and efficiently, making it a practical choice for Citrus Heights residents who need same-day cash.
pros: Multiple San Francisco locations for convenient access across the city
Extended weekday hours (9 AM–7 PM Mon–Fri) accommodate working schedules
Western Union money transfers and money orders available in-store
Tax preparation services available alongside standard money services
Green Dot Visa Debit Card issuance for those without traditional bank accounts
Online loan application available — no need to visit store to start
Payroll advances up to $250 for short-term cash needs
cons: Payday loan and payroll advance costs are not disclosed on the website — fees only revealed in store
Sunday hours unavailable at the Mission Street location
Payroll advances capped at $250, which may be insufficient for larger emergencies
Short-term loan products are high-cost by nature — website's own consumer notice warns of long-term expense
Services limited to California; no online-only or national availability
best_for: Unbanked or underbanked consumers needing immediate check cashing without a bank account
Residents who need to send money internationally via Western Union
People who want tax preparation and basic money services in a single storefront visit
Consumers needing a small payroll advance of up to $250 before their next paycheck
diagnosis: California Check Cashing Stores is best suited for unbanked or underbanked San Francisco residents who need immediate check cashing, money orders, or Western Union transfers without a traditional bank account. The main caveat is cost: payday loans and payroll advances are high-APR products, and the website deliberately withholds fee information — always ask for the full fee schedule before borrowing.
meta_description: California Check Cashing Stores at 6178 Auburn Blvd, Citrus Heights, CA. Fast check cashing with convenient hours Mon-Fri 9AM-7PM.
